name: io.github.mcpwright/edgar-mcp
title: EDGAR (SEC filings)
description: SEC EDGAR inside your agent: resolve issuers (public & private), browse Reg CF/D/A raises, screen offering economics, and read XBRL financials and insider trades.

environmentVariables.name: EDGAR_MCP_USER_AGENT
environmentVariables.description: Descriptive User-Agent with contact info, which the SEC requests (e.g. 'your-app you@example.com'). Optional but recommended.
